institution.name: University of Science and Arts of Oklahoma

flags.label: Public bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at University of Science and Arts of Oklahoma are 7% below the public bachelor's-predominant peer median ($41.9k vs $45.0k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 28% at University of Science and Arts of Oklahoma vs the 2003–2007 baseline (896 vs 1.2k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at University of Science and Arts of Oklahoma rose 18% between 2017 and 2020 ($18.4k → $21.8k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at University of Science and Arts of Oklahoma fell 18% between 2006 and 2009 (1.3k → 1.0k).
